summary: Iteration 23: Verified P0 Google Sign-In fix and P1 PDF template styling. All tests passed.
passed_tests: P0: Google Sign-In redirect uses correct 'redirect' parameter (NOT 'redirect_url')
P0: Clicking 'Continue with Google' redirects to auth.emergentagent.com with correct URL format
P0: Emergent Auth page shows 'LOG IN TO Career Boost - 215' with 'Continue with Google' button
P1: Bold template code has red background (#dc2626) for section headers with print-color-adjust: exact
P1: Contact info font size is smaller than name (fSize - 3 vs fSize + 8/12)
Login page: 'Continue with Google' button visible and clickable
Login page: 'Sign In' and 'Sign Up' tabs present
Login page: Email and Password input fields present
Resume Optimizer page: Loads correctly at /resume-optimizer
Resume Optimizer page: 'AI-Powered Resume Tool' badge visible
Resume Optimizer page: 'DioAI Resume & LinkedIn Optimizer' title visible
Resume Optimizer page: Upload → Analysis → Optimize → Download workflow steps visible
Resume Optimizer page: 'Choose File' upload button present
Resume Optimizer page: 'Google Drive' import option present

p0_google_signin_verification.auth_page_displayed: LOG IN TO Career Boost - 215 with Continue with Google button

bold_template_red_background.print_support: print-color-adjust: exact enabled via printBgForce: true

contact_info_smaller_font.name_font_size: fSize + 8 to fSize + 18 depending on template

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all P0 and P1 issues verified as fixed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23 verified: (1) P0 Google Sign-In fix confirmed - uses 'redirect' parameter correctly, auth.emergentagent.com page displays properly with 'Continue with Google' button. (2) P1 Bold template has red background (#dc2626) for section headers with print-color-adjust support. (3) P1 Contact info uses smaller font (fSize-3) than name (fSize+8 to fSize+18). All fixes verified via Playwright testing and code review.
